aboutSubtitle: Here you will find more information about me, what I do, and my current skills
aboutText: I am a 25-year-old self-taught web developer focused on improving my front-end skills. I actively immerse myself in a plethora of online resources and delve into technologies such as HTML, CSS and JavaScript on platforms such as YouTube and Udemy. My native language is Portuguese, but I have a good command of English, especially reading, which gives me access to content and resources in one of the most spoken languages in the tech world.
contactSubtitle: Feel free to contact me, I will get back to you as soon as possible
projectsSubtitle: Here, you'll find some of the personal projects I've created. Each of them details the technologies used and provides the repository link
